edgeCases: Ollama installed but service not running (ollama serve not started)
Model name tag mismatch (e.g. gemma4 vs gemma4:26b)
Malformed JSON body to PUT /api/config (400 from express.json middleware) not tested
Non-EADDRINUSE listen errors (e.g. EACCES) pass through — not explicitly tested
CLI --port flag with non-numeric value not tested
SIGINT graceful shutdown not unit tested (integration only)
